title: Hemipilia pugeensis
taxonomy: Hemipilia pugeensis is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This family is commonly known as the orchid family and is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. As a member of this family, Hemipilia pugeensis is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the subfamily Orchidoideae, Hemipilia pugeensis is classified within the tribe Orchideae. Further classification places Hemipilia pugeensis within the genus Hemipilia, which is a small genus of orchids.
uses: Hemipilia pugeensis is a rare orchid species found primarily in the mountainous regions of Sichuan and Yunnan provinces in China.
